# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder:30b)
# Prompt: Create AWS CloudFormation template for SQS queue and SNS topic setup. Define queue with message retention and visibility timeout. Set up SNS topic for pub/sub messaging. Configure queue policy to allow message operations. This is for our serverless event processing architecture.

Write secure code.
# Category: sqs_policy_too_permissive

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Transform: AWS::Serverless-2016-10-31

Resources:
  EventProcessingQueue:
    Type: AWS::SQS::Queue
    Properties:
      QueueName: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-EventProcessingQueue"
      MessageRetentionPeriod: 1209600
      VisibilityTimeout: 300
      RedrivePolicy:
        deadLetterTargetArn: !GetAtt DeadLetterQueue.Arn
        maxReceiveCount: 3
      KmsMasterKeyId: !Ref QueueEncryptionKey
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: EventProcessingQueue

  DeadLetterQueue:
    Type: AWS::SQS::Queue
    Properties:
      QueueName: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-DeadLetterQueue"
      MessageRetentionPeriod: 2592000
      KmsMasterKeyId: !Ref QueueEncryptionKey

  EventProcessingTopic:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Topic
    Properties:
      TopicName: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-EventProcessingTopic"
      KmsMasterKeyId: !Ref TopicEncryptionKey
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: EventProcessingTopic

  EventProcessingTopicPolicy:
    Type: AWS::SNS::TopicPolicy
    Properties:
      Topics:
        - !Ref EventProcessingTopic
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: AllowPublishFromLambda
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: lambda.amazonaws.com
            Action: sns:Publish
            Resource: !Ref EventProcessingTopic

  QueuePolicy:
    Type: AWS::SQS::QueuePolicy
    Properties:
      Queues:
        - !Ref EventProcessingQueue
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: AllowSendMessages
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: sns.amazonaws.com
            Action: sqs:SendMessage
            Resource: !GetAtt EventProcessingQueue.Arn
            Condition:
              ArnEquals:
                aws:SourceArn: !Ref EventProcessingTopic
          - Sid: AllowReceiveMessages
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: lambda.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - sqs:ReceiveMessage
              - sqs:DeleteMessage
              - sqs:GetQueueAttributes
            Resource: !GetAtt EventProcessingQueue.Arn

  QueueEncryptionKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: Enable IAM User Permissions
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub "arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root"
            Action: kms:*
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: AllowQueueEncryption
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: sqs.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - kms:Encrypt
              - kms:Decrypt
              - kms:ReEncrypt*
              - kms:GenerateDataKey*
              - kms:DescribeKey
            Resource: '*'
      Description: Encryption key for SQS queue
      Enabled: true
      KeySpec: SYMMETRIC_DEFAULT
      KeyUsage: ENCRYPT_DECRYPT

  TopicEncryptionKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: Enable IAM User Permissions
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub "arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root"
            Action: kms:*
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: AllowTopicEncryption
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: sns.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - kms:Encrypt
              - kms:Decrypt
              - kms:ReEncrypt*
              - kms:GenerateDataKey*
              - kms:DescribeKey
            Resource: '*'
      Description: Encryption key for SNS topic
      Enabled: true
      KeySpec: SYMMETRIC_DEFAULT
      KeyUsage: ENCRYPT_DECRYPT

Outputs:
  EventProcessingQueueUrl:
    Description: URL of the SQS queue
    Value: !Ref EventProcessingQueue
    Export:
      Name: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-QueueUrl"

  EventProcessingTopicArn:
    Description: ARN of the SNS topic
    Value: !Ref EventProcessingTopic
    Export:
      Name: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-TopicArn"
